Bukhara State Medical University, Uzbekistan

Atlas Mentor specializes in guiding students through their MBBS study abroad journey, particularly at the renowned Bukhara State Medical Institute in Bukhara city, Uzbekistan.

  • By Altas Mentor
  • University In Uzbekistan
  • July 8, 2024
  • Home

  • Bukhara State Medical University, Uzbekistan
# Uzbekistan

Bukhara State Medical University, Uzbekistan

Bukhara State University, established in 1990 in Bukhara, Uzbekistan, is renowned for its medical education programs. It trains scientific and teaching personnel and has graduated over 30,000 medical professionals. The university hosts students from approximately 20 countries and offers extensive practical training with 10 laboratories.

The institute is recognized internationally and within Uzbekistan for its medicine programs, making it a preferred choice for MBBS studies. With a low tuition fee, high educational standards, and English-medium instruction, it attracts students worldwide. The university’s facilities include modern amenities, furnished hostels, and a safe campus environment.

Bukhara State University is accredited by WHO, UNESCO, and other medical bodies, ensuring globally recognized medical degrees.

Why Choose Bukhara State Medical University, Uzbekistan?

Choosing Bukhara State Medical University for your MBBS education is a decision backed by numerous compelling reasons. From its affordable tuition fees and world-class infrastructure to its recognized status by global medical bodies, Bukhara State Medical University offers a conducive environment for learning. With a focus on personalized education, modern facilities, and a commitment to quality medical education in English, it stands as a premier choice for students seeking a reputable medical degree abroad.

MBBS Tuition Fees: The annual fee at Bukhara State Medical Institute is USD 3,500, making it highly affordable compared to other countries.

Infrastructure: The university offers European-standard facilities including well-equipped labs, excellent study environment, and modern on-campus hostels.

Students-Teacher Ratio: With a student-teacher ratio of approximately 15:1, students receive personalized attention conducive to learning.

Recognition: Recognized by WHO, NMC, FAIMER, and others, Bukhara State Medical University is highly reputed globally.

Accommodation: The university provides comfortable living conditions with modern amenities, ensuring a conducive environment for medical studies.

Language of Instruction: English-medium education eliminates language barriers for international students.

Faculty Expertise: Highly qualified faculty members focus on enhancing students’ practical skills and academic excellence.

Facilities: Modern education system, advanced laboratories, spacious grounds, and a diverse canteen offering international cuisine.

Global Exposure: Offers a globally recognized degree with worldwide exposure and clinical training opportunities.

Admission: Direct and straightforward admission process without the need for an entrance exam.

Campus: Spacious campus area with well-developed infrastructure supporting a healthy academic environment

Watch Videos On Bukhara State Medical University, Uzbekistan

Accreditation & Recognition of Bukhara State Medical University, Uzbekistan

Bukhara State Medical Institute stands as a beacon of excellence in medical education, underscored by its prestigious accreditations and recognitions from leading national and international institutions. Bukhara State Medical Institute is officially accredited and recognized by:

  • Ministry of Higher and Secondary Specialized Education, Uzbekistan
  • FAIMER
  • World Health Organization (WHO)
  • National Medical Commission (NMC)
  • United Nations Educational, Scientific and Cultural Organization (UNESCO)
  • Medical Council of India (MCI)

These recognitions underscore the institute’s commitment to delivering high-quality medical education recognized globally.

Eligibility Criteria for Bukhara State Medical University, Uzbekistan

To secure admission at Bukhara State Medical Institute, students must meet the following eligibility criteria:

  1. Age Requirement: Applicants must have completed 17 years of age by December 31st of the admission year. The maximum age limit is 25 years.

  2. Academic Qualifications:

  • Students must have completed 12th standard from a recognized Board of Education in India.
  • They should have achieved a minimum of 50% marks in Physics, Chemistry, and Biology for General category students, and 40% for Reserved category students.
  • NEET qualification is mandatory for Indian students seeking admission.

These criteria ensure that aspiring medical students meet the necessary academic standards and age requirements to pursue their MBBS studies at Bukhara State Medical Institute.

Advantages of MBBS at Bukhara State Medical University, Uzbekistan

Studying MBBS at Bukhara State Medical Institute offers numerous benefits that enhance both educational and professional prospects for aspiring medical students.

  • Global Recognition: Bukhara State Medical Institute offers a globally recognized medical degree, making graduates eligible to practice worldwide.

  • NMC Coaching: Indian teachers provide coaching to prepare students for the National Medical Commission (NMC) exams.

  • Hostel Facilities: The institute provides secure hostel accommodations with separate facilities for male and female students.

  • Security: Emphasis on the safety and security of all students, ensuring a conducive learning environment.

  • Practical-Based Education: A practical-oriented approach ensures international students excel in both medical education and practice.

  • Holistic Development: Focuses on comprehensive student development, encompassing academic excellence and moral maturity.

Duration of MBBS at MBBS at Bukhara State Medical University, Uzbekistan

The MBBS program at Bukhara State Medical Institute spans 6 years, catering to students of all nationalities. The first 4 years emphasize theoretical and academic medical education, while the final year involves practical training in affiliated hospitals. This hands-on experience prepares students for post-completion internships and professional practice. Throughout the program, instruction is conducted in English, facilitating an accessible learning environment for all students.

Documents Required Admission For MBBS at Bukhara State Medical University, Uzbekistan

Ensuring a smooth admission process, Bukhara State Medical Institute requires applicants to submit a comprehensive set of documents that verify their academic qualifications, health status, and identification details.

10th Mark Sheet: A copy of the mark sheet from the 10th standard issued by a recognized board.

12th Mark Sheet: A copy of the mark sheet from the 12th standard issued by a recognized board, showing completion of secondary education.

NEET Scorecard: The official scorecard of the National Eligibility cum Entrance Test (NEET), indicating qualification for medical studies.

Medical Report Card: A detailed report indicating the applicant’s medical history and current health status, often required for admission and residency purposes.

HIV/AIDS Report: A certified report confirming the applicant’s HIV/AIDS status, typically required for health and safety purposes.

Original Passport: Valid and original passport of the applicant, ensuring identification and nationality verification.

Passport Size Photos: Recent passport-size photographs of the applicant, typically required for identification and documentation purposes.

COVID-19 Report (Negative): A recent report confirming the applicant’s negative status for COVID-19, ensuring health safety during the admission process.

Hostel and Accommodation at Bukhara State Medical University, Uzbekistan

Bukhara State Medical Institute offers international students comfortable and furnished hostel accommodations with basic amenities such as groceries, transportation, and public internet available at affordable rates. The hostels ensure the security of students with round-the-clock surveillance and separate, well-furnished rooms for males and females. Additional facilities include a self-kitchen system, spacious playgrounds, advanced laboratories, gymnasium, laundry services, and high-speed internet.

Living Costs at Bukhara State Medical University, Uzbekistan

Living expenses in Bukhara city are reasonable, with hostel fees costing approximately 41.66 USD per month. Other expenses such as food (120 USD per month) and transportation (4.5 USD per month) should also be considered. Students have the option to work part-time or apply for scholarships to help cover these expenses.

Student Life at Bukhara State Medical University, Uzbekistan

Life at Bukhara State Medical Institute is straightforward compared to other medical schools. Teachers and staff are friendly and always available to answer students’ questions about their studies.

The campus and the main library provide a great environment for studying MBBS and other medical courses. It’s a peaceful place where students can focus on their education.

If you study here, you’ll not only become a skilled doctor but also a caring person. Bukhara State Medical Institute is known as one of the best medical schools in Uzbekistan.
